findings.title: User scenarios are missing
findings.detail: The PRD does not describe concrete user scenarios or business flows.
findings.description: The PRD does not describe concrete user scenarios or business flows.
findings.suggested_action: Add concrete user scenarios and business flows to the PRD before implementation starts.

findings.title: Acceptance criteria are incomplete
findings.detail: The PRD lacks testable acceptance criteria for product sign-off.
findings.description: The PRD lacks testable acceptance criteria for product sign-off.
findings.suggested_action: Add explicit, testable acceptance criteria that product and QA can sign off on.

findings.title: Test oracle is missing
findings.detail: QA cannot derive pass/fail expectations because acceptance criteria are absent.
findings.description: QA cannot derive pass/fail expectations because acceptance criteria are absent.
findings.suggested_action: Expand pass/fail criteria and edge-case coverage so QA can validate the requirement.

reviewer_summaries.summary: Product review completed against scenarios and acceptance coverage.
Engineering review completed against module and dependency complexity.
QA review completed against acceptance and regression coverage.
Security review completed against sensitive data and release controls.
